candidates.why: Represents earnings before interest and taxes, not interest expense itself.

candidates.row_label: Interest expense on bank borrowings and leasing
candidates.why: Primary operating interest expense on borrowings and leases; best representation of interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Interest component of lease liabilities; part of total interest expense.
Additional interest expense components; supplemental to main interest line.
Represents profit attribution, not interest expense.
Represents profit attribution, not interest expense.
Represents profit attribution, not interest expense.
Represents profit attribution, not interest expense.
Generic interest expense label but appears unpopulated here; still valid fallback label.

candidates.why: Supplemental detail for lease interest; usable as a last-resort fallback.

final_choice.row_label: Interest expense on bank borrowings and leasing
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental

variables.notes: Priority list from primary borrowing/lease interest to secondary and supplemental interest lines; non-controlling/minority items excluded as they are equity interests, not interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Profit attributable to equity holders of the parent company
candidates.why: Income statement flow (profit), not stock of equity.

candidates.row_label: Change in fair value of equity instruments
candidates.why: OCI component, not total book equity.
Specific class of instruments, not total equity.
Major component of equity but not the full total when share capital and other items exist.
Subcomponent of equity.
Explicit total equity line on balance sheet; best representation of book equity.
Income statement attribution of profit to NCI; useful but not the balance sheet minority interest stock.
Alternative income statement label for NCI attribution.
Represents controlling shareholders, not minority interest.
Explicit profit attribution to NCI; again a flow, not the stock amount.
Balance sheet line for non-controlling interests; primary choice for minority interest (MIB).
Alternative balance sheet label for minority interest; good fallback if the primary is unavailable.

variables.notes: Using balance sheet NCI lines as they represent the stock of minority interest required for MIB.
